message:
feat(macros): parse model-level configuration attributes

Extends the derive macro parser to handle #[sqlmodel(...)] attributes
at the model level:

Supported attributes:
- table: mark as database table
- from_attributes: enable ORM mode
- validate_assignment: validate on assign
- extra = "ignore|forbid|allow": extra field handling
- strict: strict type validation
- populate_by_name: accept name or alias
- use_enum_values: enum value serialization

Parser changes:
- parse_model_config(): extracts config from attributes
- ExtraFieldsBehavior parsing from string literals
- Error handling for invalid extra values

validate.rs adjustments for config integration.
Syncs beads tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
